title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_7cee4ee9.png)

2. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_4070a2bd.png)

3. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_706c63f3.jpg)

4. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_4f05e25c.png)

5. **Gods & Mortals**
*2026*
A rare blend of stock trading and area control set in Homeric Greece.
![Gods & Mortals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_a8e84cb5.jpg)

6. **The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit**
*2027*
The climactic final battles in The Lord of The Rings come alive on an epic board.
![The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_3d0048e6.jpg)

7. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_9f386083.png)

8. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_a3e4769f.jpg)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_d06e9288.jpg)

10. **Goa**
*2004*
Run a spice trade business in colonial-era India in this closed-loop economy game.
![Goa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_ce9bd8ec.jpg)

11. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2026*
Investigate the mysteries of Arkham while cosmic horrors stand in your way.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_c50be43c.png)

12. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_d9b5eea4.png)

13. **The Great Sea**
*2026*
Construct biremes, fortify trade routes, and control the ancient temples.
![The Great Sea](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_fd532032.png)

14. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_14645859.jpg)

15. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_e4b55e3d.jpg)

16. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.

17. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_98b9e4a6.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_b9d7a9d8.png)

19. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2016*
Investigate the horrors of Arkham while courting cosmic doom.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_a795132e.jpg)

20. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_e4dd84bc.jpg)

21. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_64098254.jpg)

22. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_5f003ca5.jpg)

23. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_1d81d82c.jpg)

24. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_9c213c16.jpg)

25. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_ddc1bfdb.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_2cf4d4ff.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_257fa349.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_bed63877.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_6a03c554.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_02f924f3.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_7fcf72f1.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**

9. **Terraforming Mars**

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_0d40151f.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_a426f123.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_259689aa.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_88f4d9b9.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_48364b41.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_6629ff79.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-08/toplist/bgg_3234de79.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
